demon.note: Demon lines pay more than standard, but exact multiplier is unavailable. Calculate required use multiplier and show ONLY USE IF threshold.

goblin.note: Goblin lines pay less than standard, but exact multiplier is unavailable. Calculate required use multiplier and show ONLY USE IF threshold.

Underdog._comment: power = NON-INSURED (all-or-nothing). Multipliers derived 2026-06-24 from the operator's stated actual per-leg break-evens (2=53.5%, 3=53.7%, 4=56.1%, 5=55.0%) as mult = 1/breakeven^n. NOTE: these win-multipliers are break-even-derived; if the real Underdog payouts are the round 3/6/10/20x, switch them (affects winning-slip PnL only; losses are -stake regardless). INSURED (flex / partial-payout) table is intentionally OMITTED: a single break-even does not determine the full + (n-1) partial multipliers, so Underdog flex slips remain MANUAL REVIEW until the operator supplies actual insured payouts.
